headline: A Look At Lennar (LEN) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Mixed Earnings Multiple Signals
summary: Recent share performance and company scale Lennar (LEN) has seen a series of share price declines recently, with the stock down about 1.2% over the past day, 4.8% over the past week, and 20.7% over the past month. Over the past 3 months, Lennar’s share price is lower by about 12.1%. The year-to-date move is a decline of 11.4%, and the 1-year total return is down 20.1%. Against this share performance backdrop, Lennar operates as a large US homebuilder, with reported revenue of US$33.17b and...
